# Users Topic Index

Use this index to choose which reference file to load after Context7.

- Account creation and production access: [access-authentication.md](./access-authentication.md)
- `FilamentUser`, `canAccessPanel()`, and panel-specific access: [access-authentication.md](./access-authentication.md)
- `login()`, `registration()`, `passwordReset()`, `emailVerification()`, `emailChangeVerification()`, and `profile()`: [access-authentication.md](./access-authentication.md)
- Auth route slugs, guard, broker, revealable passwords, and guest panels: [access-authentication.md](./access-authentication.md)
- User names, avatars, default avatar provider, user menu items, profile link, and sidebar user menu: [identity-user-menu.md](./identity-user-menu.md)
- App MFA, email MFA, recovery codes, required MFA, and profile UI: [multi-factor-authentication.md](./multi-factor-authentication.md)
- `tenant()`, `HasTenants`, `canAccessTenant()`, current/default tenants, tenant registration/profile, tenant menu, routes/domains, billing, resource scoping, and tenancy security: [tenancy-users.md](./tenancy-users.md)
